mapper.select: select o.*, u.user_no, u.nick_name from ai_c_order o left join ai_c_user u on u.user_id = o.user_id where o.order_id = #{orderId}
mapper.insert: insert into ai_c_order (order_no, user_id, package_id, package_name, pay_config_id, pay_channel, power_num, bonus_power_num, pay_amount, order_status, third_order_no, pay_time, create_by, create_time, remark) values (#{orderNo}, #{userId}, #{packageId}, #{packageName}, #{payConfigId}, #{payChannel}, #{powerNum}, #{bonusPowerNum}, #{payAmount}, #{orderStatus}, #{thirdOrderNo}, #{payTime}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{remark})
mapper.update: update ai_c_order set package_id = #{packageId}, package_name = #{packageName}, pay_config_id = #{payConfigId}, pay_channel = #{payChannel}, power_num = #{powerNum}, bonus_power_num = #{bonusPowerNum}, pay_amount = #{payAmount}, order_status = #{orderStatus}, third_order_no = #{thirdOrderNo}, pay_time = #{payTime}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime}, remark = #{remark} where order_id = #{orderId}
